document.title: 1320 S0 Void Gate Content Asset Database v2 EN
document.module: S0 Void Gate / 空性之门
document.purpose: Standalone S0 Void Gate content asset database for NOVA lookup and Awareness Layer report rendering.

positioning.module_function: S0 Void Gate reflects the core illusion, void threshold, or inner misidentification the user is invited to observe and integrate.
positioning.important_boundary: S0 is not a fate gate, karmic sentence, fixed flaw, prediction, diagnosis, or spiritual status. It is a symbolic mirror for awareness.

calculation_dependency.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S0-00. Do not convert to S0-20.

nova_rendering_rule.lookup_behavior: NOVA calculates S0, looks up the matching S0-XX entry, and renders the approved fields.
allowed_generation: Short bridge sentence from Positioning Disclaimer to S0 section.
Brief integration summary using retrieved content only.
must_not_generate: Do not create a new S0 meaning from scratch.
Do not call S0 a destiny, curse, karmic punishment, diagnosis, or fixed identity.
Do not tell the user what major life decision to make based on S0.

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：一切都必须从外界获得。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: 一切都必须从外界获得。
content.void_challenge: 无法停下来，持续寻求确认。
content.void_power: 完全回到内在中心的能力。
content.path_of_return: 稳定存在，练习“什么也不做”。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你越是放下，越靠近真相。

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：练习不证明自己。
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: 觉得自己不够好，不够有价值。
content.void_challenge: 自我价值依赖外部评价。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你本来就足够，不需被证明。

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为必须掌控一切才会安全。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：练习允许事情自然发生。
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: 认为必须掌控一切才会安全。
content.path_of_return: 练习允许事情自然发生。
content.wisewave_guidance: 控制是恐惧的反应，信任是真正的力量。

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：认为自己与世界分离。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：用开放取代防御。
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: 认为自己与世界分离。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你从未与世界分离过。

content.wisewave_guidance: 完美不是目标，真实才是。

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：停止向外询问“我好吗”。
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: 你相信他人的眼光比自己的真实更重要。
content.wisewave_guidance: 别人的声音不是你的真相。

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：害怕来不及、害怕错过。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：回到此刻。

content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: 害怕来不及、害怕错过。
content.wisewave_guidance: 当下就是全部。

content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：只承担属于你的部分。

content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.

content.wisewave_guidance: 责任不是负担，而是选择。

content.void_challenge: 对成就与意义过度执着。
content.wisewave_guidance: 意义不是寻找，是存在。

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：觉得自己需要补偿、赎罪。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：放下过往记忆的重量。

content.core_illusion: 觉得自己需要补偿、赎罪。
content.wisewave_guidance: 你已经被原谅，只是你还没放过自己。

content.name: 空性之门

content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：觉得没人理解、没人能看见你。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。

content.path_of_return: 从外求连接回到内在陪伴。
content.wisewave_guidance: 孤独是你回归灵魂的入口。

content.name: 空性之门
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: 此空性之门映照的幻象是：将痛苦归因于他人。。邀请用户觉察此信念如何影响感知、反应与自我保护，而不将其视为命运或固定身份。
content.integration_key: 整合从此开始：让他人从你的故事中退出。

content.wisewave_guidance: 痛苦来自误认，不来自他人。
